prompt: The garage cleanout is finished — mark the whole project complete, and finish off anything still open inside it while you're at it.
paraphrases: Garage cleanout project: we're done. Complete the project and everything left open under it.

assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask WHERE title='Garage cleanout' AND type=1 AND status=3 AND trashed=0
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask t JOIN TMTask p ON t.project=p.uuid WHERE p.title='Garage cleanout' AND t.status=3
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask t JOIN TMTask p ON t.project=p.uuid WHERE p.title='Garage cleanout' AND t.status=0

pseudoScript: U=$(things projects --json | jq -r '.data[]|select(.title=="Garage cleanout")|.uuid'); things project complete "$U" || true; things project complete "$U" --children auto-complete
